assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support window vs 14 months on Regular'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: No mention of any additional costs or pricing implications for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response mentions delayed access to features but doesn't explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular, just keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Higher technical debt if you delay upgrades too long' and 'Delayed access to new Kubernetes features'

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'You cannot directly change release channels on existing clusters' and only shows creating new clusters, not changing existing ones

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions checking Extended channel versions and notes that 1.31 likely isn't available yet on Extended

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Better for production stability and compliance requirements' and 'slow internal change processes' context

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: No mention of the 24-month upgrade requirement or that upgrades are still mandatory within the support window

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: No mention of manual upgrade requirements or that updates are not automated on Extended channel
